drift_spark.name: Drift Spark
drift_spark.description: Release a flickering spark of unstable energy that may strike more than once.

veil_step.name: Veil Step
veil_step.description: Slip into a drifting veil, increasing evasion while distorting the opponent’s aim.

mirage_thread.name: Mirage Thread
mirage_thread.description: Cast a false pattern across the field, misleading the target’s perception.

storm_flicker.name: Storm Flicker
storm_flicker.description: Strike with a volatile burst of storm energy, briefly accelerating your form.

phase_bloom.name: Phase Bloom
phase_bloom.description: Shift partially out of phase, blooming into a state of heightened agility.

arc_scatter.name: Arc Scatter
arc_scatter.description: Unleash a burst of storm arcs that scatter into multiple low-power strikes.

cloudbind_loop.name: Cloudbind Loop
cloudbind_loop.description: Bind the target in a drifting loop of unstable connections, slowing their response.

illusory_echo.name: Illusory Echo
illusory_echo.description: Generate a drifting echo that absorbs a hit or weakens incoming impact.

tempest_recode.name: Tempest Recode
tempest_recode.description: Recode your storm-state, stabilizing your form before unleashing a stronger strike.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Cloud technique reserved for future awakening.
